M A R K C O M P L E T E
In this tool training, Dean is going to show you how to use the “Seven Levels Deep” tool. This is a very important tool with the main focus of anchoring
in your “why”. There may not be a more powerful motivating factor on the planet than knowing your true “why”. When you know; in your soul, why you
get up every morning and fight for your dreams, you’ll never let anything get in your way of becoming the person you are meant to be.
S E S S I O N O V E R V I E W
TAKE NOTES
ACTION STEPS
Write down what you believe is the main goal you want to achieve in your life. Whether that is to own your own business, retire your
parents, start a homeless shelter, etc. Whatever it is, write it down.
Follow along with Dean’s training and finish 6 more levels of asking yourself “Why” to get to your true and final why.
Practice teaching this tool so you can share it to your group.
